query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `empresa_area_vinculo` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `empresaId` int NOT NULL,
  `areaId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `empresa_area_vinculo_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
